SEARCH
Package mybank

Interface BankAccount

public interface BankAccount
BankAccount Interface: Define all abstract functions and variables used by StandardAccount and VIPAccount

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deposit(double amount)
    deposit method gets an amount input from the user to deposit into the bank account balance.
    double
    getBalance()
    getBalance returns the balance of the account.
    String
    getName()
    getName method gets the name of the account and returns it.
    int
    getPasscode()
    getPasscode returns the passcode for the account.
    double
    getRate()
    getRate returns the interest rate of the account.
    boolean
    withdraw(double amount)
    withdraw method subtracts the amount of money the user wants to take out of their account (subtracted from balance).

  • Method Details

    • deposit

      void deposit(double amount)
      deposit method gets an amount input from the user to deposit into the bank account balance. Does not require a passcode to run.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of money that the user wishes to deposit into their balance on their account.

    • getName

      String getName()
      getName method gets the name of the account and returns it.
      Returns:
      The name under the account.

    • getPasscode

      int getPasscode()
      getPasscode returns the passcode for the account. Passcode is provided when an account is first initialized.
      Returns:
      The passcode (4 digit integer) for the account.

    • getRate

      double getRate()
      getRate returns the interest rate of the account. Different for both VIP and Standard accounts.
      Returns:
      The constant insterest rate for an account based on account type.

    • withdraw

      boolean withdraw(double amount)
      withdraw method subtracts the amount of money the user wants to take out of their account (subtracted from balance). Returns either true or false if the user has enough money in the account or not. Requires a passcode to run this method.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of money that the user wishes to subtract from their balance.
      Returns:
      Either true or false if the user has enough money to take out from their balance.

    • getBalance

      double getBalance()
      getBalance returns the balance of the account.
      Returns:
      The amount of money (balance) that the account has.
